name: board-deck-builder
description: > Assembles comprehensive board and investor update decks by pulling perspectives from all C-suite roles. Covers deck structure, narrative frameworks, bad news delivery, section-by-section guidance, and common mistakes. Use when preparing board meetings, investor updates, quarterly business reviews, fundraising narratives, or when user mentions board deck, investor update, board pack, board presentation, quarterly review, fundraising deck, or investor deck.
author: borghei
summary_zh: 汇总各高管视角，帮你搭建董事会和投资人汇报材料，提供叙事框架、坏消息表达技巧及分章节写作建议，适合准备董事会、季度回顾或融资路演时使用。
